backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, lesson management, progress tracking, gamification (XP, streaks, badges), and certificate generation with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (lesson catalog, interactive player, feedback system, gamification, certification) to source files and test IDs with high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of all frontend files describing components for lesson catalog, interactive exercises, gamification UI, profile management, and certificate viewing/verification.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space for consistent design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for SkillBurst application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, authentication flow, profile setup modal trigger, and route definitions for all pages.
Grid display component showing earned and locked achievement badges with visual distinction and lock icons for unearned badges.
frontend/src/components/BadgeUnlockModal: Celebratory modal with animations that displays when a user unlocks a new badge, auto-closes after 3.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/exercises/DragDr: Interactive drag-and-drop exercise component where users reorder items to answer questions. Validates answers, shows feedback, and reports completion status.
frontend/src/components/exercises/FillIn: React component for fill-in-the-blank exercises with text input, answer validation, and feedback display. Handles submission, shows correct answer on failure, and calls onComplete callback with result.
frontend/src/components/exercises/Multip: React component for multiple-choice exercises with selectable options, visual feedback for correct/incorrect answers, and explanation display. Uses FeedbackDisplay component after submission.
Feedback component showing correct/incorrect status with color-coded icons, encouraging messages, and explanatory text for exercise answers.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with sticky header, navigation menu (desktop and mobile), authentication controls, and Internet Identity integration. Handles login/logout flows and provides navigation links to lessons, certifications, profile, and verification pages.
frontend/src/components/LessonCard.tsx: Displays a lesson card with title, category, difficulty, estimated time, segment count, and progress bar. Shows completion status and uses category-specific gradient styling with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Animated modal that celebrates user level-up achievements with confetti effects, trophy icon, and displays the new skill level. Auto-closes after 4 seconds.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal form for new users to set up their profile by entering name (required) and email (optional). Saves profile data and triggers completion callback.
frontend/src/components/ProfileStatistic: Displays user statistics in a three-column grid showing lessons completed, total XP, and current streak with icons and color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/SegmentSummary.t: Shows completion summary after finishing a lesson segment, displaying accuracy percentage, XP earned, and a continue button. Provides different messages based on performance level.
frontend/src/components/StreakDisplay.ts: Card component that displays the user's learning streak in days with a flame icon that animates when streak is active.
frontend/src/components/XPDisplay.tsx: Card component showing user's current skill level, total XP, and progress bar toward next level using gamification calculations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication. Handles actor initialization with admin token, invalidates dependent queries when actor changes, and returns actor instance with loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP. Manages login/logout flow, identity persistence, delegation validation, and provides authentication status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data operations including user profiles, lessons, progress tracking, and certificate generation. Provides queries and mutations with automatic cache invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space. Defines vibrant color palette, gradient utilities, and keyframe animations for confetti, glow, and bounce effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication. Renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/CertificateVerificati: Provides a form to verify certificate authenticity by entering a verification ID, displaying certificate details (skill, completion date, verification ID) if found on the Internet Computer blockchain.
frontend/src/pages/CertificateView.tsx: Displays a certificate with decorative background image and learner details, offering download PDF and share link functionality (download is a placeholder toast notification).
frontend/src/pages/CertificationTracks.t: Shows certification tracks grouped by category (Design, Programming, Business, Creative Arts), displaying progress bars and allowing users to generate blockchain certificates upon completing all lessons in a track.
frontend/src/pages/LessonCatalog.tsx: Displays a filterable catalog of lessons by category and difficulty; shows a hero section for unauthenticated users and lesson cards with progress indicators for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/LessonPlayer.tsx: Renders an interactive lesson player that navigates through lesson segments, handles exercises (multiple choice, drag-drop, fill-in-blank), tracks progress, and displays level-up and badge unlock modals upon completion.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays user profile with avatar, name, email, XP, streak, statistics, and earned achievement badges; redirects unauthenticated users to home.
frontend/src/utils/gamification.ts: Defines gamification logic including skill level calculation based on XP thresholds, badge definitions with icons, badge eligibility checking, and formatting utilities for XP and streak displays.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with custom shadows, animations, and typography/container plugins for the frontend styling system.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a gamified micro-learning platform with architectural notes, image requirements for badges and illustrations, and existing features including lesson catalog, interactive player, feedback system, and gamification components.
